description:
Migrate all display commands to use internal/md renderer + emit() helper.

Writer changes (cmd/bw/writer.go):
- Add IsTTY() bool and IsRaw() bool to Writer interface
- Add emit(w Writer, tokenized string) helper that routes to ResolveMarkdown, ResolveTTY, or raw passthrough

Add --raw undocumented global flag (main.go) that selects RawWriter — dumps tokenized text without resolution. For integration tests and debugging. Not listed in --help.

Migration order:
1. bw list — one-liners via md.IssueOneLiner()
2. bw ready — grouped list; footer (separator, count, legend) only when IsTTY()
3. bw show — section-by-section via renderer; --only selects sections
4. bw blocked — straightforward
5. bw close — add next-action suggestion: Next: bw start <id> when work is unblocked

Cleanup cmd/bw/helpers.go — remove: fprintIssue, fprintDescription, fprintChildren, fprintMap, fprintComments, styleMD, styleInline, sectionHeader, formatDeps. Keep: fprintJSON, relativeTime, arg parsing.

bw start and bw prime deferred to Phase 3 (template-dependent).

Files: cmd/bw/writer.go, cmd/bw/helpers.go, cmd/bw/main.go, cmd/bw/list.go, cmd/bw/ready.go, cmd/bw/show.go, cmd/bw/blocked.go, cmd/bw/close.go + their tests
title: Migrate commands to tokenized markdown output
